Games Gallery

Whisp: Whisp is a game where you follow a child that ends up getting lost in a cave. In order to escape and find your pet, you need to dwell deeper, with a whisp as a guide.

Brego Vs. Midnight A simple turn-based combat game with my pets.

Game 3: Defuse the Bomb simulator.

Don't Look Down Itch Link

Don't Look Down Here is some work-in-progress pictures of a game I am currently working on as part of my senior project, called Don't Look Down. It's a physics-based climbing game set in a desolate, post-apocalyptic wasteland. You play as a lone climber (and their robotic companion) who has left behind their family in pursuit of an ancient belief: climb high enough, and you may uncover the truth about the world’s destruction — and reach the gods themselves.
